body:
## Problem
The 15 `/drummers/<slug>/endorsements` pages (sitemap priority **0.85**) all serve the generic fallback title/description. There is a handler for `/drummers/<slug>/gear-history` (added in #1308) but **no handler for `/drummers/<slug>/endorsements`**.

Confirmed gap: searching `api/meta/[...path].js` for `endorsements` → zero hits.

The 15 endorsement drummers declared in `api/sitemap.js` (`endorsementDrummers` array):
Lars Ulrich, Dave Lombardo, Danny Carey, Matt Greiner, Tomas Haake, Mike Portnoy, Gene Hoglan, Pete Sandoval, Brann Dailor, Nick Menza, Paul Bostaph, Tim Yeung, Derek Roddy, Inferno, Aquiles Priester.

**Distinct from:** `/drummers/<slug>/gear-history` (handled) and base profile `/[slug]` (handled).

## Fix
**File:** `api/meta/[...path].js`

Add directly after the existing `gear-history` handler block (search for `gear-history`). Reuse the same `getDrummerBySlug` helper.

```javascript
const endorsementsMatch = path.match(/^\/drummers\/([a-z0-9-]+)\/endorsements$/);
if (endorsementsMatch) {
  const [, slug] = endorsementsMatch;
  const drummer = getDrummerBySlug(slug);
  if (drummer) {
    return {
      title: `${drummer.name} Endorsements & Gear Sponsors | ${SITE_NAME}`,
      description: `Official gear endorsements for ${drummer.name} (${drummer.band}): drum brands, cymbal sponsors, stick deals, and hardware partnerships.`,
      image: drummer.image || `${BASE_URL}/images/og/default.png`,
      type: 'article',
      url: `${BASE_URL}/drummers/${slug}/endorsements`,
      breadcrumbSchema: [
        { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
        { name: 'Drummers', url: `${BASE_URL}/drummers` },
        { name: drummer.name, url: `${BASE_URL}/drummer/${slug}` },
        { name: 'Endorsements', url: `${BASE_URL}/drummers/${slug}/endorsements` },
      ],
    };
  }
}
```

## Estimated organic uplift
15 pages at priority **0.85** currently return generic meta. Unlocks SERP snippets for high-intent queries like "tomas haake drum endorsements", "lars ulrich gear sponsors", "danny carey cymbal deal" — secondary-funnel queries from drummers researching sponsorship deals and brand partnerships.

## Verify
1. `curl -s -A 'Googlebot' 'https://metalforge.io/api/meta/drummers/tomas-haake/endorsements'` → "Tomas Haake Endorsements"
2. `curl -s -A 'Googlebot' 'https://metalforge.io/api/meta/drummers/lars-ulrich/endorsements'` → "Lars Ulrich Endorsements"
3. BreadcrumbList present in response
4. All 15 endorsement-drummer slugs return keyword-matched meta (not generic fallback)
5. Non-endorsement drummer slugs (e.g. `/drummers/flo-mounier/endorsements`) return graceful fallback (drummer found but endorsements page = generic, OR 404)

## Done
All 15 `/drummers/<slug>/endorsements` pages return keyword-matched title/description/BreadcrumbList from `api/meta/[...path].js`.
title: SEO batch: /drummers/<slug>/endorsements pages missing SSR meta — 15 pages serve generic fallback (priority 0.85)
